name: The Bellows
developer: BOT Jungle Productions, Evan Davis, Bryce Davis, Gehrig Gosslin
short_description: The Bellows is a VR Horror experience designed to play like an interactive movie. Plunge yourself into a world of nightmares and fear, and discover just how frightening the past can really be.
detailed_description:
"Of all the things you choose in life, you don't get to choose what your nightmares are. You don't pick them; they pick you." -- John Irving

The Bellows is an experience designed with a singular focus. Scaring you, scaring your family, and scaring your friends. Plunge yourself into a world of nightmares and fear, and discover just how frightening virtual reality can be.

Available for Arcades on SpringboardVR
